race.description: Ayeleye Management Showcase Super Mdn Hcp
race.comment: MOANA GOLD (6) holding her form in stronger company and expected to go close today out to the 1500m. Gave her all in the heavy conditions with a narrow third over 1300m at Scone. Maps well and expected to go close. CZECH HER OUT (7) going better than her recent runs suggest and she gets a better set-up for this with the weight drop. Drifted back early and never got into the contest when fifth over 1300m at Illawarra Grange. Likely to roll forward today and put herself into the race. Can run into the finish. HILLBILLY HIPPIE (2) not that far away of late and desperate for this trip and further. Include.  PLAY IT COOL (14) Is also in the each-way mix on best.
